In general pickman is a better investment,  corpo is used in discard team only

I've only tried Corposant a few times by borrowing her from friends, she seems pretty strong. As for Pickman, I’m quite impressed with his ultimate, it provides a permanent damage buff. Other than that, he’s not really anything special.

I had a question on team building, and sorta the overall archetytpes or ways of building teams. I like teams with dots, triggers/procs where if you do something then someone else on your team benefits and does something else. Kind of like a loop? 

I'm not a fan of hypercarry or stalling types of teams. I've gotten to chapter 5, but got a decent amount of units. Just wondering if any teams that fit what I like and any units to invest in that fit that style? <:37_Derp:1317735193234112553> I got Xu from the banner because I heard she does poison stuff, but dunno who she pairs well with amongst the other poison units or how to make them all fit
Poison is usually stalling though
Since it takes time to stack and only procs at end of enemy turn

I mean, I don't like pure stalling <:37_Derp:1317735193234112553> like, just relying on shielding/healing and then doing big damage in a burst or something similar. Sorta hard to explain? I know dots can be stally, but they can also be somewhat bursty or rampy if there's triggers/procs in others games, that I like

People often run it on corpo or kath.
